package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
    var a, b int
    fmt.Scan(&a, &b)
    fmt.Println(a + b)
    fmt.Println(a - b)
    fmt.Println(a * b)
    fmt.Println(a / b)
    fmt.Println(a % b)
}
